message:
fix(install.ps1): improve GOBIN handling and PATH matching

- Remove unnecessary existence check for GOBIN (go install creates it)
- Use case-insensitive exact match for PATH entries instead of -notlike
- Fixes potential issues with paths containing wildcard characters []

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
